results.title: I Built a Secret LEGO Gaming Room!
results.reason: While LEGO-based, the creator explains engineering principles clearly, making it surprisingly educational for beginner spatial design.
summary: How to build furniture using toy bricks
Ways to hide a room behind a wall
Making a desk that holds a computer
Adding colorful lights to a small space

results.title: I Built An EPIC Hidden Gaming Room In My House! *PS5*
results.reason: Provides a clear look at utilizing dead space under stairs, which is a practical 'hidden' beginner project even if not strictly subterranean.
summary: Finding extra space inside a normal house
Building a secret door in a wall
Setting up a new game console
Decorating a small room with bright posters

results.title: Transforming My EMPTY Room Into My DREAM Gaming Room
results.reason: A solid walkthrough of a room transformation that is easy for beginners to follow, though it does not involve underground excavation.
summary: Planning a layout for an empty room
Picking the right desk and comfortable chair
Putting cool lights on the walls
Organizing messy wires to look clean

results.title: I built the DREAM Gaming Setup!
results.reason: Excellent for tech inspiration and setup aesthetics, but lacks structural guidance for building an underground space.
summary: Choosing the best screens for playing games
Installing high quality sound and speakers
Using smart gadgets to control the room
Making a space look very modern

results.title: I Built My DREAM $50,000 Gaming Room!
results.reason: High production value shows a room transformation, but the 'underground' aspect is missing as it focuses on an existing room.
summary: Buying top quality gear for a room
Building custom shelves for a collection
Setting up a huge screen for movies
Creating a professional space for recording
